## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Version / commit

- **Blackfyre version or commit SHA:** (`git rev-parse HEAD` or the release tag)

## Environment

- **Deployment:** local docker | self-hosted AWS | other (describe)
- **Package:** (website / admin / portal / api / cli)
- **Browser:** (if frontend)
- **Node version:**
- **OS:**

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What happens instead.

## Logs

Relevant browser console / server logs.

**Please redact credentials, tokens, and any other secrets before pasting logs.**

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots.
